spec_match.rationale: The three production patterns still demonstrate :has(audio:playing), video state sibling selectors, and playlist highlighting with media pseudo-classes.

interactive.rationale: The examples now reference local CC0 audio and video fixtures instead of silent or invalid data URIs, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for interaction verification.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still matches the feature blurb: CSS owns the visual playback state while the native media elements own playback.

edge_cases.rationale: The video example now has WebM/MP4 fallback sources, but buffering and mute badge behavior still need live browser confirmation.

references.rationale: The page includes ChromeStatus, Selectors Level 4, and MDN references.

design_system.rationale: No new raw colors were introduced and the existing compact tabbed layout remains intact.

openQuestions.title: Verify all three production media patterns
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to exercise the music tab, video tab, and playlist tab, confirming local asset playback and CSS-only state visuals.

summary: Static repair replaced inline silent/invalid media payloads with shared local CC0 fixtures across all three production patterns.
